'''鈭歫-m-f''' ('''kajamaf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:stalk|stalk]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-m-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:stalk|stalk]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歫-m-f
|-
! Lemma
| kajamaf
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijamaf|thijamaf]] || [[word:jijamaf|jijamaf]] || [[word:shijamaf|shijamaf]] || [[word:kijamaf|kijamaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujamaf|thuthujamaf]] || [[word:jujujamaf|jujujamaf]] || [[word:shushujamaf|shushujamaf]] || [[word:kukujamaf|kukujamaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujamaf|thujamaf]] || [[word:jujamaf|jujamaf]] || [[word:shujamaf|shujamaf]] || [[word:kujamaf|kujamaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujamaf|thujamaf]] || [[word:jujamaf|jujamaf]] || [[word:shujamaf|shujamaf]] || [[word:kujamaf|kujamaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejamaf|thejamaf]] || [[word:jejamaf|jejamaf]] || [[word:shejamaf|shejamaf]] || [[word:kejamaf|kejamaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojamaf|thothojamaf]] || [[word:jojojamaf|jojojamaf]] || [[word:shoshojamaf|shoshojamaf]] || [[word:kokojamaf|kokojamaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojamaf|thojamaf]] || [[word:jojamaf|jojamaf]] || [[word:shojamaf|shojamaf]] || [[word:kojamaf|kojamaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojamaf|thojamaf]] || [[word:jojamaf|jojamaf]] || [[word:shojamaf|shojamaf]] || [[word:kojamaf|kojamaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙jamaf|th忙jamaf]] || [[word:j忙jamaf|j忙jamaf]] || [[word:sh忙jamaf|sh忙jamaf]] || [[word:k忙jamaf|k忙jamaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajamaf|thathajamaf]] || [[word:jajajamaf|jajajamaf]] || [[word:shashajamaf|shashajamaf]] || [[word:kakajamaf|kakajamaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajamaf|thajamaf]] || [[word:jajamaf|jajamaf]] || [[word:shajamaf|shajamaf]] || [[word:kajamaf|kajamaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajamaf|thajamaf]] || [[word:jajamaf|jajamaf]] || [[word:shajamaf|shajamaf]] || [[word:kajamaf|kajamaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shajamaf|shajamaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshajamaf|goshajamaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishajamaf|gokishajamaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shajamafn眉|shajamafn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshajamafnkn眉|goshajamafnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishajamafn眉|gokishajamafn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajamafsh毛|shajamafsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajamafnksh毛|goshajamafnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajamafsh毛|gokishajamafsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajamafro|shajamafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajamafnkro|goshajamafnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajamafro|gokishajamafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shajamafmu|shajamafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajamafnkmu|goshajamafnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajamafmu|gokishajamafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shajamafsher|shajamafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshajamafnksher|goshajamafnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishajamafsher|gokishajamafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shajamafng|shajamafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshajamafnkng|goshajamafnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishajamafng|gokishajamafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shajamafya|shajamafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshajamafnkya|goshajamafnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishajamafya|gokishajamafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shajamafyam|shajamafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshajamafnkyam|goshajamafnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishajamafyam|gokishajamafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajamafn眉sh毛|shajamafn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajamafnkn眉sh毛|goshajamafnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajamafn眉sh毛|gokishajamafn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajamafn眉ro|shajamafn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajamafnkn眉ro|goshajamafnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajamafn眉ro|gokishajamafn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajamafn眉mu|shajamafn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajamafnkn眉mu|goshajamafnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajamafn眉mu|gokishajamafn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajamafsh毛n眉|shajamafsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajamafnksh毛n眉|goshajamafnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajamafsh毛n眉|gokishajamafsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajamafsh毛ro|shajamafsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajamafnksh毛ro|goshajamafnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajamafsh毛ro|gokishajamafsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajamafsh毛mu|shajamafsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajamafnksh毛mu|goshajamafnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajamafsh毛mu|gokishajamafsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajamafron眉|shajamafron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajamafnkron眉|goshajamafnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajamafron眉|gokishajamafron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajamafrosh毛|shajamafrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajamafnkrosh毛|goshajamafnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajamafrosh毛|gokishajamafrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajamafromu|shajamafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajamafnkromu|goshajamafnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajamafromu|gokishajamafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajamafmun眉|shajamafmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajamafnkmun眉|goshajamafnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajamafmun眉|gokishajamafmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajamafmush毛|shajamafmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajamafnkmush毛|goshajamafnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajamafmush毛|gokishajamafmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajamafmuro|shajamafmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajamafnkmuro|goshajamafnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajamafmuro|gokishajamafmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
